Home / Bonuses should extend play — not confuse it

Bonuses should extend play — not confuse it

A bonus is a contract: extra funds for extra rules. Read before you accept.

Play Astronaut Claim bonus

Bonus types you will see

Welcome packages, reload promos, cashback, occasional free spins in slot-heavy campaigns, and targeted promo codes. Each alters your accounting — track bonus balance vs cash balance separately.

Checklist before opting in

  • Crash eligibility for wagering.
  • Multiplier and time deadline.
  • Max bet while wagering.
  • Withdrawal cap from bonus winnings.

Codes live in the promo code guide.

Ready for liftoff? Claim your bonus and launch Astronaut at 1win.

Play Astronaut Claim bonus

Interaction with cashout strategy

Heavy wagering can push you into high-frequency play — the opposite of calm multiplier exits. Sometimes declining a promo preserves decision quality.

Frequently asked questions

Are bonuses always +EV?

No. Terms can make them emotionally expensive even when they look large.
